        • Accordion
        • Tabs

      Table

      Tables should be used for tabular data, not page layout.

      Good Example

      Monthly Revenue
      MonthRevenue
      January$10,000
      February$12,000
      export function TableGood() {
  return (
    <table className="w-full border-collapse border">
      <caption className="mb-2 text-left font-medium">Monthly Revenue</caption>

      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th scope="col" className="border p-2 text-left">
            Month
          </th>

          <th scope="col" className="border p-2 text-left">
            Revenue
          </th>
        </tr>
      </thead>

      <tbody>
        <tr>
          <td className="border p-2">January</td>
          <td className="border p-2">$10,000</td>
        </tr>

        <tr>
          <td className="border p-2">February</td>
          <td className="border p-2">$12,000</td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  );
}

      Bad Example

      <table>
  <tr>
    <td>Name</td>
    <td>Revenue</td>
  </tr>
</table>

      Accessibility Notes

      • Use th for headers.
      • Use scope="col" or scope="row".
      • Use caption when the table needs context.
      • Do not use tables for layout.

      Screen Reader Output

      Monthly Revenue table

Column 1: Month
Column 2: Revenue

January, $10,000

      Common Mistakes

      ❌ Using td as headers

      <td>Name</td>

      ✅ Use th

      <th scope="col">Name</th>

      ❌ Missing caption

      <table></table>

      ✅ Provide context

      <caption>
  Monthly Revenue
</caption>
